title: Story Map Building and Visualising Tool for Science and Society
description: The Story Map Building and Visualising Tool (SMBVT) is an open-source online platform developed by the National Research Council of Italy for collaborative creation of narrative maps in the Horizon 2020 MOVING project. It integrates a semantic knowledge base with the D4Science e-Infrastructure to enable secure multi-user access and enriched multimedia storytelling of territorial value chains.
